title: SQLancer query copy on unique pair of columns fails and complex query with GDK error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (x INT, y VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY t1_x_y_unique (x, y));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE x < (SELECT MAX(x) FROM t1) AND y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT x, COUNT(*) FROM t1 GROUP BY x HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
key_bug_features: Query fails on unique pair of columns with complex conditions
